titleStmt.title: SII 28.307: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 307. (A.R. No. 461 of 1913.) TAḌĀVŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Portions of this inscription have been erased.

This inscription records the grant as mudal aḍaṅgā-iṟai-ili (tax free with the mudal having been left out of account) inclusive of the levies kāttikaippaichchai, mātṛi-śānti, āḷ-amañji etc. of (the village ?) Periyēri, already in the vāra-paṟṟu (wherein the lands concerned contributed a fixed proportion of the produce to the God or any person entitled to it) of God Tiruvēgambam-uḍaiyanāyinār of Taḍāvūr in Mēlgaṅgaipāḍi-nāḍu in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Janaṉātha-vaḷanāḍu to the same god by Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-Vāṇakōvaraiyaṉ. Besides this donor, Edirili-chōḻa-vēḷān also certified the document. The purpose of the gift was to meet the expenses on the worship of the God, the maintenance of the building of the temple and on the conduct of festivals. cf. No. 308 below

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 vatu kulottuṅkacoḻavāṇakovaraiyaṉeṉ milā
ṭākiya janaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu melkaṅkaipāṭi nāṭṭil taṭāvūr Uṭaiyār tiruvekampamuṭaiya nāyināṟkku
Ivar vārapaṟṟu periyeri nañcai nilat Irai puñcai karai puñcai poṭṭai puñcai Āṟṟukku vaṭakku ni4 10 5 li lattu
ttikaippaiccai mātiricāṉti Āḷamañci Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Iḻaṉtu Iṉnāyanāṟkku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷ Aḻivukkum caṉti
rātittavaraiyum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku kulottuṅka coḻa vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ivai Etirili coḻaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . śrīmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 28.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
